requirement_topic.en: Cell / Module Safety — BIS CRS Registration (IS/IEC 62619 / IS 16046) — Cell-Level Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯/模组安全 — BIS注册认证（IS/IEC 62619 / IS 16046）——电芯层面范围
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯/模組安全 — BIS登記認證（IS/IEC 62619 / IS 16046）——電芯層面範圍

summary.en: Lithium-ion cells and batteries for industrial and stationary applications sold in India must comply with IS/IEC 62619: 2022 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications). Portable lithium cells are additionally covered by IS 16046 Part 1: 2018 (aligned with IEC 62133-1) and IS 16046 Part 2: 2018 (aligned with IEC 62133-2). The Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) covers specific listed product categories — BIS CRS/FMCS registration under IS/IEC 62619 or IS 16046 is understood to apply at the CELL and MODULE level for products covered by the relevant Quality Control Orders (QCOs). IMPORTANT SCOPE LIMITATION: Compulsory BIS certification for a COMPLETE, integrated stationary BESS unit (as a whole system) under a single BIS QCO or CRS notification is NOT clearly established as of 2026 — no confirmed QCO specifically mandating whole-unit BESS system registration has been verified. Manufacturers should verify the current scope of BIS QCOs with BIS directly to confirm whether cells, modules, or assembled systems fall under mandatory CRS/FMCS registration for their specific product. Foreign manufacturers at cell or module level must obtain BIS FMCS registration if their product category is covered. The BIS Scheme of Testing and Inspection (STI) governs the testing and factory audit process.
summary.zh: 在印度销售的工业和固定应用锂离子电芯及电池须符合IS/IEC 62619: 2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）。便携式锂电芯还须符合IS 16046 Part 1: 2018（与IEC 62133-1对应）和IS 16046 Part 2: 2018（与IEC 62133-2对应）。印度标准局（BIS）强制注册认证（CRS）覆盖特定列明产品类别——IS/IEC 62619或IS 16046下的BIS CRS/FMCS注册被认为适用于相关质量控制令（QCO）涵盖产品的电芯和模组层面。重要范围说明：截至2026年，针对完整集成固定式BESS单元（作为整体系统）的强制BIS认证尚无明确规定——尚未确认存在专门规定整机BESS系统强制注册的QCO。制造商应直接向BIS核实当前QCO范围，以确认电芯、模组或整机系统是否须纳入强制CRS/FMCS注册。电芯或模组层面的境外制造商，如其产品类别在涵盖范围内，须取得BIS FMCS注册。BIS检测与检验计划（STI）规定了检测和工厂审核程序。
summary.zht: 在印度銷售的工業和固定應用鋰離子電芯及電池須符合IS/IEC 62619: 2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）。便攜式鋰電芯還須符合IS 16046 Part 1: 2018（與IEC 62133-1對應）和IS 16046 Part 2: 2018（與IEC 62133-2對應）。印度標準局（BIS）強制登記認證（CRS）覆蓋特定列明產品類別——IS/IEC 62619或IS 16046下的BIS CRS/FMCS登記被認為適用於相關品質管制令（QCO）涵蓋產品的電芯和模組層面。重要範圍說明：截至2026年，針對完整集成固定式BESS單元（作為整體系統）的強制BIS認證尚無明確規定——尚未確認存在專門規定整機BESS系統強制登記的QCO。製造商應直接向BIS核實當前QCO範圍，以確認電芯、模組或整機系統是否須納入強制CRS/FMCS登記。電芯或模組層面的境外製造商，如其產品類別在涵蓋範圍內，須取得BIS FMCS登記。BIS檢測與檢驗計劃（STI）規定了檢測和工廠審核程序。

standards_or_laws: IS/IEC 62619: 2022 — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications (BIS CRS mandatory)
IS 16046 Part 1: 2018 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells (aligned with IEC 62133-1)

IS 16046 Part 2: 2018 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium batteries (aligned with IEC 62133-2)
BIS Act 2016 and BIS (Conformity Assessment) Regulations 2018 — legal basis for CRS and FMCS

summary.en: China mandates GB 36276-2023 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage) for stationary BESS cells and modules. GB 36276 is tested by CNAS-accredited labs and is mandatory under SAC (Standardization Administration of China). Additionally, GB/T 36558-2022 covers general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems at the system level. While IEC 62619 and GB 36276 share some technical alignment for stationary lithium battery safety, BIS India does not accept Chinese GB certificates or Chinese-lab test reports as substitutes for BIS CRS registration under IS/IEC 62619.
summary.zh: 中国对固定式BESS电芯和模组强制执行GB 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求）。GB 36276由CNAS认可实验室检测，并在SAC（中国国家标准化管理委员会）管理下属强制标准。此外，GB/T 36558-2022涵盖储能系统通用技术要求（系统级）。尽管IEC 62619与GB 36276在固定式锂电池安全方面存在一定技术对应，但印度BIS不接受中国GB证书或中国实验室检测报告作为IS/IEC 62619 BIS CRS注册的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國對固定式BESS電芯和模組強制執行GB 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求）。GB 36276由CNAS認可實驗室檢測，並在SAC（中國國家標準化管理委員會）管理下屬強制標準。此外，GB/T 36558-2022涵蓋儲能系統通用技術要求（系統級）。儘管IEC 62619與GB 36276在固定式鋰電池安全方面存在一定技術對應，但印度BIS不接受中國GB證書或中國實驗室檢測報告作為IS/IEC 62619 BIS CRS登記的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池（Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage — mandatory CN)
GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件（General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)

gap.en: BIS CRS/FMCS registration under IS/IEC 62619 (and IS 16046 for portable cells) is a mandatory India import and market-access requirement for lithium CELLS and MODULES where covered by a BIS Quality Control Order. Chinese GB 36276 certification and GB test reports are not accepted by BIS as equivalent. Foreign manufacturers at the cell or module level must apply for BIS FMCS, have products tested by a BIS-recognised lab, and pass a factory audit before the BIS registration mark can be affixed. HOWEVER: compulsory BIS certification for the COMPLETE assembled BESS unit (as a whole system) has not been confirmed — no verified QCO mandating whole-unit BESS system registration was found. Manufacturers must verify the current QCO scope with BIS directly before assuming whole-system mandatory registration applies. No mutual recognition exists between BIS and Chinese certification bodies (CQC, CGC, etc.) for this scope.
gap.zh: IS/IEC 62619（及便携电芯的IS 16046）下的BIS CRS/FMCS注册，对于BIS质量控制令涵盖的锂电芯和模组，是印度进口与市场准入的强制要求。中国GB 36276认证及GB检测报告不被BIS接受为等效依据。电芯或模组层面的境外制造商须申请BIS FMCS，由BIS认可实验室对产品进行检测，并通过工厂审核，方可贴附BIS注册标志。但须注意：完整整机BESS单元（作为整体系统）的BIS强制认证尚未得到确认——未找到专门规定整机BESS系统强制注册的经验证QCO。制造商在假定整机系统强制注册适用前，须直接向BIS核实当前QCO范围。BIS与中国认证机构（CQC、CGC等）之间在此范围内不存在互认协议。
gap.zht: IS/IEC 62619（及便攜電芯的IS 16046）下的BIS CRS/FMCS登記，對於BIS品質管制令涵蓋的鋰電芯和模組，是印度進口與市場准入的強制要求。中國GB 36276認證及GB檢測報告不被BIS接受為等效依據。電芯或模組層面的境外製造商須申請BIS FMCS，由BIS認可實驗室對產品進行檢測，並通過工廠審核，方可貼附BIS登記標誌。但須注意：完整整機BESS單元（作為整體系統）的BIS強制認證尚未得到確認——未找到專門規定整機BESS系統強制登記的經驗證QCO。製造商在假定整機系統強制登記適用前，須直接向BIS核實當前QCO範圍。BIS與中國認證機構（CQC、CGC等）之間在此範圍內不存在互認協議。

mandatory_status.target: Cell-level BIS CRS/FMCS registration under IS/IEC 62619 and IS 16046 Parts 1 & 2 is mandatory for lithium cells and modules where covered by a BIS Quality Control Order. Compulsory BIS certification for the complete BESS system (whole-unit) is NOT clearly established — verify current QCO/CRS scope with BIS before assuming mandatory whole-system registration applies.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market (GB 36276-2023 mandatory safety standard per SAC); GB/T 36558-2022 is a recommended/referenced standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — SCOPE UNCERTAINTY] For lithium CELLS and MODULES covered by a BIS Quality Control Order: BIS CRS/FMCS registration under IS/IEC 62619 (industrial) or IS 16046 Parts 1 & 2 (portable) is required before import or sale in India. GB 36276 or GB/T 36558 certification alone does not satisfy this requirement. However, compulsory BIS certification for the COMPLETE assembled BESS unit as a whole system has not been confirmed as of 2026 — no verified QCO mandating whole-unit registration was found. Chinese BESS manufacturers should verify with BIS whether their specific product (cells, modules, or full system) falls under a current mandatory QCO before drawing compliance conclusions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考——范围存在不确定性] 对于BIS质量控制令涵盖的锂电芯和模组：在印度进口或销售前须取得IS/IEC 62619（工业用）或IS 16046 Part 1及Part 2（便携式）下的BIS CRS/FMCS注册。仅持有GB 36276或GB/T 36558认证不满足此要求。但须注意：截至2026年，完整整机BESS单元的BIS强制认证尚未得到确认——未找到专门规定整机注册的经验证QCO。中国BESS制造商在得出合规结论前，应向BIS核实其具体产品（电芯、模组或整机系统）是否在现行强制QCO范围之内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考——範圍存在不確定性] 對於BIS品質管制令涵蓋的鋰電芯和模組：在印度進口或銷售前須取得IS/IEC 62619（工業用）或IS 16046 Part 1及Part 2（便攜式）下的BIS CRS/FMCS登記。僅持有GB 36276或GB/T 36558認證不滿足此要求。但須注意：截至2026年，完整整機BESS單元的BIS強制認證尚未得到確認——未找到專門規定整機登記的經驗證QCO。中國BESS製造商在得出合規結論前，應向BIS核實其具體產品（電芯、模組或整機系統）是否在現行強制QCO範圍之內。
